allow: PowerShell(Remove-Item -Force "$env:USERPROFILE\\AcademicoAVD2DB.mdf" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Force "$env:USERPROFILE\\AcademicoAVD2DB_log.ldf" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "Arquivos MDF/LDF removidos")

PowerShell(sqllocaldb start MSSQLLocalDB 2>&1 | Out-Null; cd "C:\\Users\\maias\\source\\repos\\AcademicoAVD2\\AcademicoAVD2"; $env:ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT="Development"; $env:ASPNETCORE_URLS="http://localhost:5199"; Start-Process -FilePath "dotnet" -ArgumentList "run --no-build" -WorkingDirectory "C:\\Users\\maias\\source\\repos\\AcademicoAVD2\\AcademicoAVD2" -WindowStyle Hidden; Write-Output "App iniciando...")

PowerShell($ok=$false; for\($i=0;$i -lt 20;$i++\){ Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5199/Aluno" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; if\($r.StatusCode -eq 200\){ Write-Output "HTTP 200 OK"; if\($r.Content -match "Alunos"\){Write-Output "Pagina de Alunos carregou"}; $ok=$true; break } } catch { } }; if\(-not $ok\){ Write-Output "Nao respondeu a tempo" })
